news.headline: Helios obtains ISO-27001:2022 certification and SOC 2 Type 1 compliance, serving clients in 125+ countries.
news.summary: Helios, a leading workforce management provider serving organizations in over 125 countries, demonstrates its dedication to data security and compliance with the recent attainment of ISO 27001:2022 certification for information security. Established in Chicago on Oct. 21, 2024, Helios solidifies its commitment to safeguarding data, highlighting its global presence and industry leadership.

news.headline: Yahara Software wins Best Place to Work by Madison Magazine for 2024, recognized for people-first culture.
news.summary: In Madison, Wisconsin on October 21, 2024, Yahara Software, a prominent custom software development company, was honored with the Best Place to Work award by Madison Magazine for the year 2024. This esteemed accolade highlights the company's emphasis on a culture that prioritizes its employees and its commitment to promoting employee well-being.

news.headline: Silfa Dental introduces savings plan for seniors on Medicare in New York to receive high-quality care.
news.summary: On October 15, 2024, open enrollment for Medicare commenced, offering millions of seniors in New York the opportunity to secure suitable Medicare coverage. The choice between Original Medicare and other options can be overwhelming for many beneficiaries seeking access to quality care and benefits.

news.headline: See the latest data on sector and industry performance for this year with Bloomberg. #finance #business #industry
Zhang Dental Group in Tustin offers a savings plan for affordable senior care as Medicare enrollment begins in California.
news.summary: In TUSTIN, California on October 21, 2024, the open enrollment period for Medicare started on October 15. Seniors in California, numbering in the millions, are faced with the challenge of selecting suitable Medicare coverage options such as Original Medicare or Medicare Advantage plans. This decision-making process can be difficult for many of these individuals.

news.headline: Lumen teams up with Meta to boost AI ambitions through increased network capacity. Yield long-term benefits.
news.summary: Lumen Technologies (stock symbol: LUMN) and Meta have joined forces to enhance Meta's network capacity and support its ambitious AI goals through Lumen's Private Connectivity Fabric. This collaboration aims to provide a long-term boost to Meta's network capabilities.

news.headline: Village Walk Dental in Chula Vista launches savings plan for seniors accessing Medicare, aiding millions in California.
news.summary: Beginning on October 15, 2024, open enrollment for Medicare started, offering accessible care for seniors in Chula Vista, California. This enrollment period will assist millions of seniors in the state who are faced with the decision of choosing between Original Medicare or alternative coverage options.

news.headline: DataScan appoints Chelsey Snyder as Banking Account Manager, enhancing industry commitment. Key move in promoting lender solutions.
news.summary: Alpharetta, Georgia, October 21, 2024 - DataScan, a prominent provider of dealer commercial lending solutions, has announced the appointment of Chelsey Snyder as the Banking Account Manager. This move signifies DataScan's dedication to the industry. The company aims to enhance its position in the market through strategic appointments like this one.

news.headline: Face Foundrié is expanding to the West Coast with a new store in San Francisco, providing affordable and accessible skincare.
news.summary: A new store by FACE FOUNDRIÉ, known for its affordable and inclusive skincare services, has opened in San Francisco on October 21, 2024. The Focused Facial Bar, known for its efficiency and effectiveness, has now expanded to the West Coast. Providing accessible skincare solutions, the new store aims to cater to a wider audience in San Francisco.

news.headline: Dynata forms new board of directors with 6 members including CEO Mike Petrullo. Announcement made on Oct. 21, 2024.
news.summary: In Shelton, Connecticut, on October 21, 2024, Gene Davis, Mitch Barnes, Mike Bevacqua, Manish Bhatia, Christian Champ, and Eric Johnson have been appointed to join CEO Mike Petrullo on Dynata's recently formed independent board of directors. Dynata, LLC, widely regarded as the most reliable source for...

news.headline: Snail Games (Nasdaq: SNAL) regains Nasdaq compliance with minimum bid price requirement on Oct. 21, 2024.
news.summary: Today, in Culver City, California, Snail Games, a prominent independent developer and publisher of interactive digital entertainment listed on Nasdaq as SNAL, revealed that they have been notified by the Listing staff regarding an undisclosed matter.

news.headline: Sun Life Financial to release Q3 2024 results on Nov 4, 2024. Webcast on Nov 5, 2024 at 10:00 AM.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, Sun Life Financial Inc. (TSX: SLF) (NYSE: SLF) announced that it will unveil its third quarter financial figures on November 4, 2024, after the market's closing. The live webcast of the results is scheduled for November 5, 2024, at 10:00 AM EST.

news.headline: Tickets on sale for documentary "Patterns of Evidence: The Israel Dilemma - Ancient Prophecies" screening on Nov. 13, 14, and 17 only in theaters.
news.summary: Tim Mahoney, a Christian filmmaker, will premiere his latest documentary titled "Patterns of Evidence: The Israel Dilemma - Ancient Prophecies" exclusively on November 13, 14, and 17 in theaters in Minneapolis. The film will delve into intriguing historical mysteries.

news.headline: Kroger extends exchange offers for Albertsons notes; expiration date pushed back. (Char. count: 83)
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, Kroger Co. (NYSE:KR) revealed an extension of the expiration date for the Exchange Offers concerning the ACI Notes of Albertsons. The offers allow for the exchange of all outstanding notes. The company, also known as Kroger, made this announcement without specifying a new deadline for the Exchange Offers.Character count: 73

news.headline: Ross Stores opens 47 new locations, completes 2024 store growth plans by adding 43 Ross Dress for Less and 4 dd's DISCOUNTS stores across 22 states.
news.summary: In Dublin, California on October 21, 2024, Ross Stores, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROST) successfully finalized its expansion strategy by launching a total of 43 Ross Dress for Less® ("Ross") and four dd's DISCOUNTS® stores in September and October. Spread across 22 states, these new stores mark the completion of the company's growth plan for 2024.

news.headline: IceCure's next-gen cryoablation system gets patent approval from US PTO, enhancing usability and cryogen integrity.
news.summary: IceCure Medical Ltd. has introduced advanced cryogenic system connector technology aimed at enhancing user experience and preserving the integrity of cryogenics during the cryoablation procedure. The innovation, developed in Caesarea, Israel, is set to revolutionize medical practices. IceCure Medical Ltd., listed on Nasdaq as ICCM, is driving this technological advancement in the field.

news.headline: OpenText partners with Cork to offer cybersecurity solutions, cyber warranties for SMBs & MSPs, boosting revenue.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on October 21, 2024, Wateroo-based company OpenText™ revealed a new partnership with Cork Inc. aimed at enhancing service offerings and ensuring financial protection for clients. This collaboration is designed to boost revenue streams for both companies and improve client retention. OpenText™, listed on NASDAQ as OTEX and on TSX as OTEX, is optimistic about the opportunities this strategic partnership will bring.

news.headline: ZETWERK secures 1.5 GW module order from NTPC Renewables, the world's largest managed marketplace for contract manufacturing.
news.summary: In Bengaluru, India, on October 21, 2024, ZETWERK Manufacturing Businesses, the parent company of Unimacts and the leading managed marketplace for contract manufacturing globally, revealed a significant achievement. The company has successfully obtained a substantial second order from the National Thermal Power Corporation (NTPC). This showcases Unimacts' growing prominence in the field, emphasizing its capability to secure large-scale contracts.

news.headline: TMRW Life Sciences and Cryoport Systems partner for enhanced offsite storage & biologistics in fertility care. (word count: 15)
news.summary: Nashville, Tennessee and New York - On October 21, 2024, Cryoport, Inc. (NASDAQ: CYRX) announced their collaboration with another ISO-certified industry leader to offer fertility clinics comprehensive and secure IVF specimen management and transportation solutions. This partnership aims to provide reliable services to fertility clinics worldwide.

news.headline: Gracianna Winery named among 3 winners out of hundreds in the Fiverr x Martha Stewart promotion.
news.summary: A renowned entrepreneur offers guidance to a wine brand known for its appreciation and strength in HEALDSBURG, California. On October 21, 2024, Gracianna Winery was revealed as one of the top three victors out of numerous entrants in the fiercely contested Fiverr x Martha competition.

news.headline: Yoroi Wallet users can earn up to 10% ADA cashback from 775+ retailers via Bring integration.
news.summary: Yoroi Wallet, part of EMURGO, has partnered with Bring to connect the traditional web with the web3 space, linking over 775 real-world merchants and brands. Through this collaboration, users can receive up to 10% ADA cashback. The announcement was made in Singapore on October 21, 2024. Yoroi Wallet is a leading light wallet within the Cardano ecosystem, while Bring is recognized as the pioneering white-label crypto platform.

news.headline: Global Health Exhibition starts in Riyadh with SAR 50 billion investments on first day. #HealthInvestments
news.summary: In Mulham, north of Riyadh in Saudi Arabia, the seventh Global Health Exhibition has commenced, with the theme "Invest in Health". The event is taking place at the Riyadh International Convention and Exhibition Center. This edition is hosted under the patronage of local officials and has attracted significant attention, with a large number of attendees expected.

news.headline: Alpha Tau Medical Ltd. accepted into FDA's TPLC Advisory Program to speed up market access for Alpha DaRT for recurrent GBM.
news.summary: Jerusalem-based Alpha Tau Medical Ltd. revealed on October 21, 2024, that it has been granted entry into the Total Product Life Cycle (TPLC) Advisory Program (“TAP”) Pilot by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (“FDA”). This program aims to hasten the market availability of Alpha DaRT®, an alpha-emitters cancer therapy developed by Alpha Tau, specifically for patients grappling with recurrent glioblastoma multiforme (“GBM”). Previously, the Company secured a Breakthrough Device Designation from the FDA for GBM, one of two such distinctions awarded for Alpha DaRT, which was a prerequisite for the TAP program application. The Company's stock trades on NASDAQ under the tickers DRTS and DRTSW.

news.headline: VCI Global names Victor Lee as new Executive Director, effective Nov. 1, 2024, to enhance leadership & business strategy.
news.summary: VCI Global Limited (NASDAQ: VCIG) (Frankfurt: H0T), a diversified holding company based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, specializing in consulting, fintech, AI, robotics, and cybersecurity, has recently disclosed the recruitment of Victor Lee as their new executive director effective from November 1, 2024. This move aims to enhance the company's management structure and synchronize it with its developing business environment and future plans.

news.headline: Verint earns Great Place to Work® Certification for the 2nd year, with 85% of employees rating it positively; 15 countries certified.
news.summary: Verint (NASDAQ: VRNT), The CX Automation Company, has been recognized as a Great Place To Work for the second consecutive year. Around the world, 85% of Verint employees expressed satisfaction with their workplace, which is a higher score than the previous year and 28 percentage points above the average for U.S.-based companies. This year, Verint has received certification in 15 countries, showing the company's commitment to fostering a positive work environment.

news.headline: ApeChain Mainnet launched at ApeFest in Lisbon, powered by ApeCoin. Partnership with key tech companies, featuring industry-first demos.
news.summary: A new blockchain named ApeChain has been introduced at ApeFest Lisbon through a collaboration between ApeCoin DAO, Yuga Labs, Layer Zero, The Arbitrum Foundation, Horizen Labs, Caldera, Wire Network, and Off Chain Labs. This creator-centric blockchain operates using its own token called ApeCoin ($APE). ApeChain boasts cutting-edge technology features such as account abstraction utilizing Yuga ID, gas-sponsored transactions, native yield, simplified onboarding via Ape Portal, and the innovative use of LayerZero’s Omnichain Fungible. This launch marks a significant advancement in the blockchain industry with notable partners and advancements in technology.

news.headline: Wedbush Securities introduces new APIs for clearing clients, enhancing integration; streamline processes with connectivity.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Wedbush Securities, a financial services firm, has launched a set of advanced APIs for its clearing clients, facilitating improved integration. These APIs empower clients to seamlessly link with Wedbush, enhancing processes like customer onboarding and account management. Clearing clients of Wedbush can now benefit from these APIs, gaining the capability to optimize various operations.

news.headline: Energy Vault and Enervest to deploy 1.0 GWh (1,000 MWh) energy storage project in New South Wales, Australia.
news.summary: Energy Vault Holdings Inc. has signed a deal with Enervest Group for a 1,000 MWh battery energy storage system at the Stoney Creek site in New South Wales, Australia. Energy Vault, a leader in sustainable energy storage solutions, announced this partnership for a grid-scale project. The companies are currently in the process of finalizing the development and grid application for this significant energy storage initiative.

news.headline: Rakesh Mohan appointed as Chief Digital & Technology Officer by The AZEK Company Inc. (NYSE: AZEK) in Chicago.
news.summary: In Chicago, The AZEK Company Inc. (NYSE: AZEK) has announced the appointment of Rakesh Mohan as the Chief Digital & Technology Officer (CDTO). AZEK is a top manufacturer of outdoor living products like TimberTech® Decking, Versatex®, and StruXure® pergolas. Mohan will take charge in enhancing the company's technology capabilities as part of the leadership team.

news.headline: DigitalBridge acquires majority stake in JTOWER Inc. via tender offer from August 15 to October 10, 2024.
news.summary: In Boca Raton, Florida, DigitalBridge Group, Inc. (NYSE: DBRG) revealed the accomplishment of a tender offer for common shares and stock acquisition rights of JTOWER Inc. (“JTOWER”; TSE: 4485), a key player in Japan's digital infrastructure sector. The initiative began on August 15, 2024, and wrapped up on October 10, 2024. DigitalBridge, a prominent global digital infrastructure investment company, successfully completed this strategic move in the dynamic Japanese market.

news.headline: Metaverse Market poised for growth: $83.9 billion in 2023 to $1,303.4 billion by 2030 at 48% CAGR. Dominated by Microsoft, Sony, Meta, HTC.
news.summary: The global Metaverse Market is projected to grow from USD 83.9 billion in 2023 to USD 1,303.4 billion by 2030, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 48.0%. The market report by MarketsandMarkets™ offers insights into the metaverse dynamics, with 291 tables, 67 figures, and 359 pages. Key drivers include demand from entertainment and gaming industries, while restraints relate to costs and regulations. Significant players in the market include Microsoft, Sony, Meta, and Apple. The metaverse combines physical and digital worlds through AR, VR, real-time 3D, and interactive video, gaining traction in various sectors. The software segment is expected to dominate the market, encompassing gaming engines, 3D modeling tools, and financial platforms. Opportunities for growth lie in adjacent technologies like VR, AR, cloud gaming, and AI in social media.

news.headline: James Gorman appointed as Disney's Chairman; CEO change set for early 2026 as part of board shake-up.
news.summary: A significant change is taking place on the board as James Gorman, who oversees the succession planning for current CEO Robert A. Iger, will assume the role of chairman on January 2, 2025.

news.headline: Mercer International Inc. plans a $200 million senior notes offering due 2028 and redemption of $200 million 5.500% senior notes.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, Mercer International Inc. (Nasdaq: MERC) revealed plans for an Offering of $200 million in total principal amount for its senior notes, set to mature on October 1, 2028 (the "Additional Notes"). This Offering will be an extension of an existing indenture from September 21, 2023, where the Company initially issued $200.0 million in aggregate principal of 12.875% senior notes due 2028 (the "Existing Notes").

news.headline: Inventiva to present Phase 2 trial results at AASLD The Liver Meeting® 2024 on lanifibranor + empagliflozin in MASH+T2D.
news.summary: Inventiva (IVA), a biopharmaceutical company listed on Euronext Paris and Nasdaq, focusing on oral small molecule therapies for metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (MASH/NASH), announced that the Phase 2 study, LEGEND, on lanifibranor combined with empagliflozin in MASH and Type-2-Diabetes patients has been approved as a late breaker at the 75th Annual American Association for the Study of Liver Diseases (AASLD) The Liver Meeting® 2024 in San Diego, California from November 15 to 19, 2024.

news.headline: Veru to present at ObesityWeek on Nov 3-6, 2024 in San Antonio, Texas, discussing Enobosarm trials for weight loss.
news.summary: Veru Inc., a biopharmaceutical company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker VERU, has disclosed plans to participate in ObesityWeek 2024, scheduled for November 3-6 in San Antonio, Texas. This announcement was made in Miami, FL on Oct. 21, 2024. The company specializes in advanced clinical stage medicines targeting muscle preservation in areas such as weight loss, oncology, and viral induced acute respiratory distress syndrome.

news.headline: StemSation International set to Acquire Gorilla Marketing Group, LLC through Letter of Intent (LOI).
news.summary: StemSation International has recently revealed the signing of a Letter of Intent (LOI) to acquire Gorilla Marketing Group, LLC. This strategic move is anticipated to enhance the company's market position and expand its reach. StemSation International aims to leverage this acquisition to strengthen its offerings and increase revenue. The deal signifies a significant milestone for StemSation International as it looks to solidify its presence in the industry. This acquisition is poised to bring together the expertise and resources of both companies to drive growth and maximize opportunities in the market.

news.headline: Mobile-health Network Solutions (Nasdaq: MNDR) will announce Fiscal 2024 results on October 23rd and hold a conference call on October 24th at 8:00 AM ET.
news.summary: Singapore, October 21, 2024 - Mobile-health Network Solutions (Nasdaq: MNDR) ("MaNaDr"), a prominent telehealth provider in Asia-Pacific, will hold a conference call on October 24, 2024, at 8:00 AM ET to review its Fiscal Year 2024 financial outcomes concluding on June 30, 2024. The revealed results are scheduled for October 23, post 4:00 PM ET.

news.headline: Nova Minerals will discuss Estelle Project progress at 2024 ThinkEquity Conference. #mining #2024ThinkEquityConference
news.summary: In a recent report, it was stated that there has been a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the country. Over the past week, there have been a total of 10,000 new cases reported, bringing the total number of confirmed cases to 50,000. The increase in cases has put a strain on the healthcare system, with hospitals across the country experiencing a surge in patients requiring treatment. In response, the government has implemented stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus, including mandatory mask-wearing in public places and limitations on social gatherings. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to these guidelines in order to prevent further spread of the virus and protect vulnerable populations.

news.headline: Kura Sushi USA will announce fiscal Q4 and FY 2024 results on Nov 6, 2024 with conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET.
news.summary: Kura Sushi USA, Inc., a tech-driven Japanese restaurant chain trading on NASDAQ under KRUS, will hold a conference call on November 6, 2024, at 5:00 p.m. ET to discuss its fiscal Q4 and full year 2024 financial performance. The call will feature President and CEO Hajime “Jimmy” Uba, CFO Jeff Uttz, and Ben Porten, SVP Investor Relations & System Development. The company will release the financial results the same day after market close.

news.headline: Bright Minds Biosciences and Firefly Neuroscience collaborate post BREAKTHROUGH study: Phase 2 trial on BMB-101 in Absence Epilepsy for EEG data analysis.
news.summary: Bright Minds Biosciences Inc. (NASDAQ: DRUG) has announced a renewed collaboration with Firefly Neuroscience, Inc. (NASDAQ: AIFF) to analyze the electroencephalogram (EEG) data in their BREAKTHROUGH study. The study is an open-label Phase 2 clinical trial assessing BMB-101, a targeted 5-HT2C receptor agonist, in adult patients with classic Absence Epilepsy and Developmental Epileptic Encephalopathy (DEE). This joint effort aims to evaluate the safety, tolerability, and efficacy of the drug.

news.headline: Atossa Therapeutics CEO to discuss breast cancer prevention collaboration at BIO-Europe 2024 with Karolinska Institute on Nov. 4-6 in Stockholm, Sweden.
news.summary: Atossa Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: ATOS), based in Seattle, disclosed that its Chairman and CEO, Dr. Steven Quay, will engage in a fireside chat alongside Dr. Per Hall, a Professor of Epidemiology at Karolinska Institute, during BIO-Europe 2024. This event, set for November 4-6, 2024, in Stockholm, Sweden, will feature discussions on integrating an advanced AI risk model with emerging therapies to potentially prevent breast cancer in high-risk individuals. Atossa, a clinical stage biopharmaceutical firm, concentrates on developing groundbreaking treatments focusing on breast cancer and other oncology areas with substantial unmet clinical needs.

news.headline: ECD Auto Design to present at LD Micro Main Event XVII Investor Conference on Oct 29-30, 2024, in Kissimmee, Fla.
news.summary: KISSIMMEE, Florida, October 21, 2024 - ECD Automotive Design, Inc. (Nasdaq: ECDA), a prominent company known for its work on Land Rover Defenders, Jaguar E-Types, Ford Mustangs, and Toyota FJs, has disclosed plans to participate in the LD Micro 17th Annual "Main Event" scheduled for October 29-30, 2024. This event will offer the company a platform to showcase its restored, modified, and electrified vehicles to a wider audience of investors and enthusiasts.

news.headline: Truth+ streaming service launches on iOS & Apple TV by Trump Media. App offers news and shows.
news.summary: Reportedly, around 16,000 individuals have been affected by the recent floods in the region, with 8,500 homes damaged or destroyed. Additionally, the death toll has risen to 42, with search and rescue operations ongoing. The government has allocated $5 million for emergency relief efforts, including providing shelter, food, and medical assistance to those affected. Local authorities are urging residents to evacuate to higher ground and stay safe during this natural disaster.

news.headline: SoundThinking expands ShotSpotter coverage in Montevideo, Uruguay, doubling deployment to 12sq km with a 3-year agreement.
news.summary: SoundThinking, Inc. has revealed a new partnership with the Ministry of Interior of Uruguay, extending ShotSpotter's coverage in Montevideo over the next 3 years. This initiative will lead to a doubling of the area covered by ShotSpotter, adding 12 square kilometers to the existing gunshot detection system.

news.headline: Witan Alliance PLC reports Net Asset Value is at £500 million, showing a 10% increase in quarterly results.
news.summary: According to recent reports, the number of new COVID-19 cases has seen a significant rise in the past week, with over 10,000 new cases reported in various regions. Additionally, the total number of active cases has surpassed 50,000, putting a strain on the healthcare system. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and get vaccinated as soon as possible. With the increase in cases, there is growing concern about the impact on the economy and daily life. Efforts are being made to ramp up testing and vaccination efforts to control the spread of the virus. The government is considering implementing stricter measures to curb the rising number of cases and protect public health.

news.headline: US market driven by exceptionalism, facing a potential jinx.
Analysts in Brazil increase interest rate forecast for the second consecutive week.
Dow Jones futures decline from record highs, Nvidia and Tesla stocks fall in morning trading.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones futures experienced a decline from their record highs on Monday. This drop was accompanied by decreases in the stock prices of Nvidia and Tesla during morning trading. The specifics of the extent of the decline in the Dow Jones futures, as well as the percentages of the decreases in the stock prices of Nvidia and Tesla, were not provided.

news.headline: Latin Metals receives permit to advance exploration at Esperanza Copper-Gold Project in San Juan Province, Argentina. #mining #exploration
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that global internet usage has reached an all-time high of 4.6 billion users, with an increase of 7% in the past year alone. Additionally, social media platforms are now being utilized by 3.8 billion people worldwide, indicating a significant growth of 9% from the previous year. This surge in internet and social media usage highlights the continued reliance on digital platforms for communication and information sharing. These numbers underscore the importance of online presence for individuals and businesses in the modern age.

news.headline: Holidaily Brewing expands into Pacific NW with 1991 Husky Championship team, now in 200 Safeway locations in WA.
news.summary: In Golden, Colorado on October 21, 2024, Holidaily Brewing Company, the top female-owned and operated gluten-free brewery in the country, revealed its expansion into the Pacific Northwest by partnering with nearly 200 Safeway stores across Washington state. This move marks a significant milestone for the company as they continue to grow their reach in a key market, providing their unique gluten-free beers to a wider audience.
